title: 皐月賞の後に・ご令嬢の一冠

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
King Halo grabs first place in the Satsuki Sho, the
first of three races in the Classic Triple Crown
tour.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some fans expect nothing less from "her mother's
daughter," but those words of praise mean
nothing to King Halo as she leaves them behind
to march forward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she can keep this up, she'll claim first place in
the renowned Japanese Derby. With such a
victory, the crowd will have no choice but to
recognize her for her.
